---
title: "Welcome"
---

## DS-MLOps Path

A structured, project-based path from Python fundamentals to production-ready
data science and MLOps - software engineering standards applied to the full
data science lifecycle, following [CRISP-DM](https://medium.com/@shawn.chumbar/the-crisp-dm-process-a-comprehensive-guide-4d893aecb151)
from business understanding to deployment.

This book collects the hands-on tutorials. Each notebook runs top to bottom
and includes activities with a stated goal, expected output, and a hint -
fill in the `...` placeholders yourself before checking the next section.

**Part 1 - Python Basics** covers language core, professional patterns
(functions, dataclasses, exceptions, file I/O), and NumPy for data and ML.
Its matplotlib chapter is still being rewritten to the same standard and
will be added once ready. Later parts (dev tools, data analysis, classical
ML and deep learning, MLOps) are still being written and will be added
chapter by chapter as they're finished.

Source code: [github.com/sambaiga/ds-mlops-path](https://github.com/sambaiga/ds-mlops-path)
